title: Breakup Bootcamp
author: Amy Chan
subline: The science of rewiring your heart.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A heart split in two by a clean vertical red line. The left half is hairline outlined; the right half is rendered as a circuit board — the science of rewiring. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1200)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left half of heart: hairline -->
    <path d="M 0 100 Q 0 0 -50 -60 Q -150 -180 -250 -120 Q -350 -60 -300 60 Q -200 200 0 300 Z" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Right half of heart: circuit-board style — short rectilinear traces and nodes -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <path d="M 0 100 L 0 0 L 50 -60 L 100 -100"/>
      <path d="M 50 -60 L 80 -100 L 200 -100 L 220 -60 L 280 -60 L 280 -120 L 320 -120"/>
      <path d="M 100 -100 L 100 -150 L 180 -150"/>
      <path d="M 0 100 L 0 200 L -80 200 L -80 240 L -200 240"/>
      <path d="M 0 200 L 100 200 L 100 240 L 200 240"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Circuit nodes -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <circle cx="80" cy="-100" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="-60" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="-120" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="-150" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-80" cy="200" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-200" cy="240" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="240" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="240" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The split line: a single bold red vertical line down the middle -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-200" x2="0" y2="320" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Top label: the two halves labeled -->
    <text x="-160" y="-220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">HURT</text>
    <text x="160" y="-220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">REWIRED</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A heart split in two by a single RED vertical seam. The left half is a hairline outline (the 'hurt' side, anatomical). The right half is a circuit-board of rectilinear traces and nodes (the 'rewired' side, mechanical). The title 'BREAKUP / BOOTCAMP' is at the top in 320px weight 500. The visual thesis: a breakup is the surgery that turns hurt into a rewire — and the new shape is half-human, half-machine.
